subject: [PATCH v7 02/15] mm: rename uffd-wp PTE bit macros to uffd

2026-06-29.patch_summary: This patch renames the uffd-wp PTE bit macros to simply 'uffd' across various architectures, including x86 and arm64. The rename is done to reflect that the bit marks userfaultfd tracking, rather than write protection. This change does not modify any behavior, but rather updates the naming convention to be more accurate and consistent. The patch affects several files in the Linux kernel source code, making changes to various header files and macros related to page table entries.
